title: Boogers & Snot
description: This minecraft mod gives you the ability to pick your nose, go to a new dimension, and even beat a boss!
body:
This minecraft mod gives you the ability to pick your nose, go to a new dimension, and even beat a boss!
When you pick ur nose ("P" by default), you get a booger clump. Crafting 9 of these together gives you a Booger block. Placing the booger blocks in a portal formation and lighting it with a flint and booger takes you to the booger dimension. Here you can fight tissues, and eventually a booger boss if you get enough boogers. You can also put snot in a bucket. Surrounding a snot bucket with nine booger stones makes a fossilized booger, smelting it turns it into a boogerite scrap, crafting 4 of those with 4 booger clumps gives you a boogerite ingot. And surrounding a boogerite ingot with tissue paper (dropped by tissues) gives you a booger summoner. Right clicking a booger summoner on a block summons the booger boss. When defeated, the booger boss drops a special item you'll have to play the mod to find out! ;)
